name: Mini Cinnamon-Apple Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. In a small bowl, mix crushed crackers, walnuts, and cinnamon. In a large bowl, combine cake mix, apple pie filling, eggs, and sour cream; beat with an electric mixer until well blended. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the graham cracker mixture into the bottom of each greased and floured tin of a 6 mold fluted tube pan. Spoon 2 tablespoons of batter over the cracker mixture. Spoon 1 tablespoon of cracker mixture over the batter. Top with 2 tablespoons of batter. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes; invert cakes onto a wire rack and cool completely. Store in an airtight container. Yield: 12 - 4 inch coffee cakes.
